Hearing held, argued and tentative ruling is adopted and amended as follows: Plaintiffs' motion for preference is granted pursuant to C.C.P. 36(a). Trial date is September 10, 2018 at 11:15a.m. in Department 503. Last day pursuant to C.C.P. 36(f) is September 14, 2018. Local Rule 20 shall be followed by the parties as well as all San Francisco Local Rules and California Rules of Court. Summary judgment/adjudication motions shall be brought on regular notice pursuant to the relevant provisions of the C.C.P., unless the parties stipulate otherwise.
